files.justification: Legacy validation analyzer over the soft limit. Do not grow it; split during the next validation refactor.
Legacy broad plugin analyzer tests over the soft limit. New analyzer tests should be split into focused files.

folders.justification: Existing core model folder over the folder limit. New core subsystems should be grouped into subdirectories.
Existing analyzer implementation folder over the folder limit. New analyzer pieces should be grouped by concern.
Existing plugin runtime folder over the folder limit. New plugin runtime areas should move into subdirectories.
Existing verifier folder includes generated verifier support. New verifier areas should be grouped into subdirectories.
Legacy monolithic test project folder. New tests should be split into focused subdirectories when practical.

rootFolders.justification: Existing core project root predates the project-folder limit. New core implementation files should be grouped into subdirectories.
Existing hosting project root predates the project-folder limit. New hosting implementation files should be grouped by concern.
Existing analyzer project root predates the project-folder limit. New analyzer implementation files should be grouped into subdirectories.
Existing plugin project root predates the project-folder limit. New plugin implementation files should use subdirectories.
Existing verifier project root predates the project-folder limit. New verifier concerns should use subdirectories.
Legacy monolithic test project root predates the project-folder limit. New tests should move into focused subdirectories where practical.
